---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# get expect expectation of factorized operators

**对于需要重排希尔伯特空间order的优化还是需要手动排序 to shadows**.  
MPO is Matrix naturally, so the union indices(s_1, s_2, ...) to sum must be same.
其实用更基本的Itensor来做运算，本身不同的空间顺序自然会造成合并成的MPO的linkdims不同。所以其实和一开始就换空间顺序没有区别

## normal way

```{julia}
# get classical shadows
using RandomMeas
N = 6
NU = 400
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
ψ = MPS(ComplexF64, site_indices, ["0", "0", "1", "1", "0", "0"])
NM = 400
```

```{julia}
# calculate the expectation by normal way
measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
measurement_group = MeasurementGroup(ψ , measurement_settings, NM);
factorized_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(measurement_group);
include("03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/03_Performance_Optimization/get_factorized_expectation/ops_function.jl")
reflect_op = create_reflect_op(N, site_indices); 
@elapsed @show get_expect_shadow(reflect_op, factorized_shadows)
exact_val = inner(ψ', reflect_op, ψ) 
```

## permute siteindices

```{julia}
# calculate the expectation by change the sites orders
include("03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/03_Performance_Optimization/get_factorized_expectation/siteindices_function.jl")
newsite_indices = permute_siteindices(site_indices, [1, 6, 2, 5, 3, 4])
```

```{julia}
# get new shadows
new_ψ = MPS(ComplexF64, newsite_indices, ["0", "0", "0", "0", "1", "1"])
new_measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
new_measurement_group = MeasurementGroup(new_ψ , new_measurement_settings, NM);
new_factorized_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(new_measurement_group);
```

```{julia}
# calculate the expectation by change the sites orders
new_reflect_op = create_adjacent_swap_op(N, newsite_indices);
linkdims(new_reflect_op);
@elapsed @show get_expect_shadow(new_reflect_op, new_factorized_shadows)
new_exact_val = inner(new_ψ', new_reflect_op, new_ψ)
```

## other questions

**If the data you find from a true quantum computer, you should permute the bitstrings in .npz file**
